info.title: Prowl LLM Orchestration API
info.description: REST API for LLM-driven orchestration of the Prowl security crawler. Enables programmatic crawl control, discovery queries, mid-crawl adjustments, intervention handling, and attack surface reporting.

post.description: Launch a new crawl session with full configuration. The crawl runs as a background task. Use GET /crawl/status to monitor progress.

get.description: Returns full crawl status: engine state, request counts, coverage stats, rate limiter state, current phase.

post.description: Pause all crawl workers. Queued requests are preserved.
Gracefully stop the crawl. Flushes pending data and writes output.

get.description: Returns the CrawlConfig used for the current/last crawl.

schema.title: Response Get Config Api V1 Crawl Config Get

get.description: Returns all 10 pipeline phases with current state and exploration statistics.

schema.title: Response List Phases Api V1 Phases Get

get.description: Returns detail for a specific pipeline phase by name.
Returns stats for all 13 discovery modules.

schema.title: Response List Modules Api V1 Modules Get

get.description: Returns detail for a specific module by name.
Returns endpoints with rich filtering. Supports filtering by tag, page_type, HTTP method, auth requirement, parameter presence, source module, and URL pattern.

parameters.name: tag

schema.description: Filter by tag (e.g. api, admin, debug)
schema.title: Tag

parameters.description: Filter by tag (e.g. api, admin, debug)

parameters.name: page_type

schema.description: Filter by page type (login, error, api_json, admin, etc.)
schema.title: Page Type

parameters.description: Filter by page type (login, error, api_json, admin, etc.)

parameters.name: method

schema.description: Filter by HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, etc.)
schema.title: Method

parameters.description: Filter by HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, etc.)

parameters.name: source_module

schema.description: Filter by source module (s1_spider, s4_js, etc.)
schema.title: Source Module

parameters.description: Filter by source module (s1_spider, s4_js, etc.)

get.description: Returns a single endpoint by its fingerprint hash.
Returns input vectors (attack surface parameters) with filtering by risk indicator, location, reflection status, and endpoint URL.

parameters.name: risk_indicator

schema.description: Filter by risk tag (ssrf_candidate, sqli_candidate, cmdi_candidate, etc.)
schema.title: Risk Indicator

parameters.description: Filter by risk tag (ssrf_candidate, sqli_candidate, cmdi_candidate, etc.)

parameters.name: location

schema.description: Filter by location (query, body, header, cookie, path)
schema.title: Location

parameters.description: Filter by location (query, body, header, cookie, path)

get.description: Returns all detected technologies with confidence scores and evidence.

parameters.name: category

schema.description: Filter by category (framework, server, cms, frontend, waf)
schema.title: Category

parameters.description: Filter by category (framework, server, cms, frontend, waf)

schema.title: Response List Tech Stack Api V1 Tech Stack Get

get.description: Returns all discovered secrets (API keys, tokens, passwords).

parameters.name: kind

schema.description: Filter by secret kind (api_key, token, etc.)
schema.title: Kind

parameters.description: Filter by secret kind (api_key, token, etc.)

schema.title: Response List Secrets Api V1 Secrets Get

get.description: Returns authentication boundary transitions.

schema.title: Response List Auth Boundaries Api V1 Auth Boundaries Get

get.description: Query stored HTTP transactions (request/response pairs) without bodies. Use GET /transactions/{id} for full detail and /transactions/{id}/response-body for body content.
Returns full transaction detail including headers and body sizes.
Returns the raw response body bytes for a specific transaction.
Returns a tree structure of discovered endpoints organized by host and path.

schema.title: Response Get Sitemap Api V1 Sitemap Get

get.description: Returns a node/edge graph of discovered paths for visualization.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of endpoints to include
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of endpoints to include

schema.title: Response Get Graph Api V1 Graph Get

post.description: Programmatically inject URLs into the active crawl queue. URLs are validated against scope and dedup before acceptance.

get.description: Returns the current crawl scope configuration: target host and regex patterns.

post.description: Add include/exclude regex patterns to the crawl scope at runtime. Scope can only be expanded, not contracted.
Inject authentication session data (cookies, headers, bearer token) into the session pool for a specific role.

get.description: Returns current queue size, total URLs queued, and total dropped.

post.description: Update mutable configuration fields mid-crawl without restart. Only max_depth, max_requests, request_delay, saturation_threshold, and user_agent can be changed at runtime.

get.description: Returns all intervention requests (pending, resolved, expired).

schema.title: Response List Interventions Api V1 Interventions Get

get.description: Returns only pending interventions that need resolution.

schema.title: Response List Pending Interventions Api V1 Interventions Pending Get

post.description: Resolve an intervention by providing auth data (cookies, headers, token, credentials). The engine is automatically resumed after resolution.

get.description: High-level attack surface overview with risk score, endpoint/vector/tech/secret counts for LLM triage.
Composite risk score (0-100) with breakdown: high-risk vectors, unprotected admin, exposed debug, secrets.
Consolidated high-risk findings: input vectors with risk indicators, unprotected admin endpoints, exposed debug endpoints, and discovered secrets.
Coverage bitmap, hindsight feedback, rate limiter state, per-phase exploration stats, and per-module stats.
Returns the complete AttackSurfaceReport as JSON. Warning: this can be large for big scans.

schema.title: Response Get Full Report Api V1 Report Full Get

get.description: Returns hindsight feedback insights: patterns detected from non-success responses (auth boundaries, method hints, etc.).

parameters.name: insight_type

schema.description: Filter by insight type (auth_redirect, method_not_allowed, etc.)
schema.title: Insight Type

parameters.description: Filter by insight type (auth_redirect, method_not_allowed, etc.)

schema.title: Response Get Hindsight Api V1 Report Hindsight Get

AttackSurfaceSummaryResponse.title: AttackSurfaceSummaryResponse
AttackSurfaceSummaryResponse.description: High-level attack surface summary for LLM triage.

scope_patterns.title: Scope Patterns
scope_patterns.description: Regex patterns to include in scope

exclude_patterns.title: Exclude Patterns
exclude_patterns.description: Regex patterns to exclude from scope

modules.title: Modules
modules.description: Modules to run (empty=all). Options: s1_spider, s2_bruteforce, s3_params, s4_js, s5_api, s6_passive, s7_auth, s8_states, s9_infra, s10_tech, s11_input, s12_auth, s13_report

output_formats.title: Output Formats
output_formats.description: Output formats: json, markdown, html, burp

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Enable web dashboard (already running if using API)

CrawlStartRequest.title: CrawlStartRequest
CrawlStartRequest.description: Full crawl configuration for programmatic launch.

state.title: State
state.description: Engine state: idle, running, paused, stopping, stopped

page_type.title: Page Type
page_type.description: Page classification: login, error, api_json, admin, static, custom_404

phase_exploration.title: Phase Exploration
phase_exploration.description: Per-phase exploration: new_coverage, discovery_rate, requests, elapsed

HighRiskFindingsResponse.title: HighRiskFindingsResponse
HighRiskFindingsResponse.description: Consolidated high-risk findings for LLM prioritization.

auth_role.title: Auth Role
auth_role.description: Auth role to use for these requests

InjectURLsRequest.title: InjectURLsRequest
InjectURLsRequest.description: Inject URLs into the crawl queue.

location.title: Location
location.description: Input location: query, body, header, cookie, path

input_type.title: Input Type
input_type.description: Data type: string, integer, file, json, xml

risk_indicators.title: Risk Indicators
risk_indicators.description: Risk tags: ssrf_candidate, lfi_candidate, sqli_candidate, cmdi_candidate, ssti_candidate, redirect_candidate

kind.title: Kind
kind.description: Intervention type: login, captcha, two_fa, manual

state.title: State
state.description: Module state: pending, running, complete, error, needs_attention

status.title: Status
status.description: Operation result: ok, paused, resumed, stopped, resolved, error

has_more.title: Has More
has_more.description: Whether more items exist beyond this page

location.title: Location
location.description: Parameter location: query, body, header, cookie, path, graphql_arg

state.title: State
state.description: Phase state: pending, running, complete, error, skipped

exploration.title: Exploration
exploration.description: Exploration stats: new_coverage, discovery_rate, requests, elapsed

ResolveInterventionRequest.description: Provide auth data to resolve an intervention.

high_risk_vectors.title: High Risk Vectors
high_risk_vectors.description: Input vectors with risk indicators (ssrf, sqli, cmdi, etc.)

add_include_patterns.description: Regex patterns to add to include list

add_exclude_patterns.title: Add Exclude Patterns
add_exclude_patterns.description: Regex patterns to add to exclude list

ScopeUpdateRequest.description: Add include/exclude patterns to the crawl scope.

kind.title: Kind
kind.description: Secret type: api_key, token, password, etc.

token.title: Token
token.description: Bearer token to inject as Authorization header

category.title: Category
category.description: Category: framework, server, cms, frontend, waf
